event.description: First Mars-native crop cycle exceeds all projections

subsim_log.sexpr:
(let ((food 1.58)
              (water 1.18)
              (pop 6)
              (crisis 0.00))
          (if (> crisis 0.5)
            (list "ration" (* food 0.8) (* water 0.7))
            (if (> food 1.5)
              (list "expand" (+ pop 2) food)
              (list "maintain" pop food))))

colonist_diaries.entry:
Year 47 — Nova (water)
Mood: hopeful. Event: First Mars-native crop cycle exceeds all projections.
Action: explore. Colony morale: strained.
